---
name: New skill proposal
about: Propose a new skill for the toolkit. Open this before writing a PR.
title: "[skill] "
labels: skill-proposal
---

## One-sentence summary

<!-- What workflow does this skill automate? -->

## Trigger signals

<!-- What does the user say or do that should invoke this skill? Be concrete. -->

## Negative scope

<!-- What is this skill NOT for? List at least two things it should decline to do. -->

## Why now

<!-- What recurring workflow prompted this? If it's a one-off, a skill is probably not the right shape. -->

## Web fallback

<!-- Every skill must work in Claude AI (Web) too. How? -->

## Overlap check

<!-- Which existing skills (in this toolkit or in Anthropic's repos) are adjacent? Why is this different rather than a modification to one of them? -->

## Pre-research

<!--
Anthropic GitHub: [relevant existing skills / no overlap]
Community: [similar community skills / no relevant ones]
-->
